primary_variables.matched_definition: Intervention using a compound that inhibits a target protein, pathway, or process.
evidence: incubated plasma and sterile acute wound fluids ex vivo with different concentrations of the endogenous proteases HNE and CG, or the bacterial proteases S. aureus V8 and P. aeruginosa LasB

attributes.dose_or_concentration: 3.33 μg per 1.00 mg of plasma (low), 33.3 μg per 1.00 mg of plasma (high)
attributes.route_or_context: ex vivo incubation in plasma and acute wound fluids
evidence: incubated plasma and sterile acute wound fluids ex vivo with different concentrations of the endogenous proteases HNE and CG
For the endogenous proteases, these concentrations were 3.33 μg of HNE... per 1.00 mg of plasma
we also selected a ‘high’ condition, which was 10x higher amounts of each protease
incubated for 24 h at 37°C

attributes.dose_or_concentration: 0.17 units per 1.00 mg of plasma (low), 1.7 units per 1.00 mg of plasma (high)
attributes.route_or_context: ex vivo incubation in plasma and acute wound fluids
evidence: incubated plasma and sterile acute wound fluids ex vivo with... the bacterial proteases S. aureus V8 and P. aeruginosa LasB

combining both low and high ratios for all three donors, we found clear differences in identified proteins and peptides as expected (Figure 2A). Indeed, 3- to 4-fold higher numbers of proteins and 4- to 9-fold higher numbers of peptides were detected after HNE... treatment as compared to the undigested control samples
4- to 9-fold higher numbers of peptides were detected after... CG... treatment as compared to the undigested control samples
4- to 9-fold higher numbers of peptides were detected after... LasB... treatment as compared to the undigested control samples
4- to 9-fold higher numbers of peptides were detected after... V8... treatment as compared to the undigested control samples
clear differences were observed when using the ‘low’ and ‘high’ amount of these proteases

base_candidates_ranked.reason: Data acquired using DD-MS2 top speed method on Orbitrap Eclipse; quantification described as peptide counting and relative abundance via heatmaps.

modifier_candidates_ranked.reason: The study is explicitly a peptidomic analysis using nonspecific cleavage to identify enzyme-specific cleavage patterns and targets.
